pāṣya n. pl. Gestein, Steinbollwerk: tvaṃ sutasya made ariṇā apo vi vṛtrasya samayā pāṣyārujaḥ  ṚV. 1,56,6 . du. die Soma-Steine: upa tritasya pāṣyo3rabhakta yadguhā hitam 9,102,1 . pāṣyoḥ gen. für pāṣyayoḥ.
— Vgl. pāśī, pāṣāṇa.
